faqs.question: Which is better among B.E (IT) and B.Tech food technology? Which has more scope and high earning jobs in future?
faqs.answer:
Well, this is a subjective question. Both the fields have their own pros and cons. Information Technology has a wide scope and career opportunities, given the technological advancements and digital revolution that the world is heading towards. If you are passionate and have skills you can get amazing opportunities in abroad as well with lucrative salary. 
Further, Food technology is rather a growing field with increasing demand for the food technologists across the country with rasing concerns around food safety and nutrition in India. So, you need to think about your interest areas and then decide for yourself. Best of luck!

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Food Technology - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Our college situated in a good healthy environment. Teachers should improve students knowledge.

review_content.Placements: About 10% of the students got placed in different food industries. The highest salary offered was Rs. 25,000 per month, while the lowest salary offered was Rs. 15,000 per month. Top recruiting companies for our course are ITC, Fall Food, Srini Food, MTR, etc. Top roles offered in our course are QC executive, QA executive and R&D trainee. The highest salary package offered in our course is 3.0 LPA, while the lowest salary package offered is 2.0 LPA and the average salary package offered is 2.5 LPA. Out of 100 students, all students got placements in Tirumala Dairy, Ongole Dairy, ITC Foods, Envirocare Labs, Patanjali and Heritage Foods.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Food Technology - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Atmosphere and the surrounding of the college was good. Staff and facilities are also good.

review_content.Placements: Naturopath, Nutritional therapist, Product/process development scientist, Quality manager, Regulatory affairs officer are the top roles offered. Students complete their internship in 6 months. Top recruiting companies are Nestle, Britannia and heritage food.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is really good and the labs are perfectly alright for our work. The food is good and the mess is on the ground floor of the girl's hostel. And medical sports are also good. Students also get a lot of medals who participated in games and sports.

J Abdul Kalam Institute of Technology has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering.
faqs.question: Which major specializations are available at Dr. A. P. J Abdul Kalam Institute of Technology?

faqs.answer: A:    The overall seats available across all courses offered by Dr. A. P. J Abdul Kalam Institute of Technology is up to 180. Good thing to know is that Dr. A. P. J Abdul Kalam Institute of Technology has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.
faqs.question: How much is the intake across all courses being offerred at Dr. A. P. J Abdul Kalam Institute of Technology?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied with all the things in here.

review_content.Placements: There is no average or maximum placement criteria; if your luck is with you, you'll get the opportunity to work anywhere. If its not like that, you'll be the same person as all those who are passed out and doing nothing. There is no need to take admission; I'm warning again because there will be no placement opportunity.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have a Wi-Fi which do not work. No gaming equipment will be given if you want to practice. And hostel facilities are not available here; you have to be in PG or somewhere else. I have taken admission here and thought that it is a government college so it must be bigger than usual. And what did I get. ? The main building of this college is the only building we have. No need to take admission here.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: College Needs Improvement to be Worthy of Titles IIT in the Future.

review_content.Placements: My CSE batch is the first CSE batch here, so no details about CSE batch placements. But as for other branches, I will say the placement rate is very less until now, but the college is in the development state for I hope that in the near future, college will bring more companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: College- The college has been running since 2016 so infrastructure is relatively good and the college is still developing its infrastructure so it will definitely be refined in the future. Our CM visited us and told us that they are going to convert our college into IIT in the near future. Hostel - There is no hostel yet, but a new building is under construction that will serve as a hostel and will be ready within the next 2-3 years. But there are PGs available nearby which cost almost 6-8k per month. And more PG buildings are under construction.

review_summary.college_name: Dr. A. P. J Abdul Kalam Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of the infrastructure and faculty, and no placements till 2025.

content.Placements: There are no placements from the college as the first batch of CSE branch passed out last year, and not even a single student got any kind of placement in any company. Not even a single student got any kind of internship from the college. No company came to the college for the interview process.
content.Infrastructure: There is no hostel facility for the students or even for the teachers. There is only a single building that contains all of the B.Tech branches, departments. The labs and classrooms are not so good. The classrooms are burning hot in the summer, and in the labs no computer system even works properly.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college have limited sources and facilities are good but bad placement.

content.Placements: Our college has a good placement record. About 70% of our students were placed with the lowest and average packages. About 90% of our students got internships from our course at NHPC Pvt. Ltd. and Neel Metal Product Limited, which is under the JBM Group.
content.Infrastructure: Our college does not have proper classrooms for our department. The library is adequate, but some of the labs are not properly maintained. The college does not have hostel or food facilities, and sports and games are not properly maintained.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied with all the things in here.

content.Placements: There is no average or maximum placement criteria; if your luck is with you, you'll get the opportunity to work anywhere. If its not like that, you'll be the same person as all those who are passed out and doing nothing. There is no need to take admission; I'm warning again because there will be no placement opportunity.
content.Infrastructure: We have a Wi-Fi which do not work. No gaming equipment will be given if you want to practice. And hostel facilities are not available here; you have to be in PG or somewhere else. I have taken admission here and thought that it is a government college so it must be bigger than usual. And what did I get. ? The main building of this college is the only building we have. No need to take admission here.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: College Needs Improvement to be Worthy of Titles IIT in the Future.

content.Placements: My CSE batch is the first CSE batch here, so no details about CSE batch placements. But as for other branches, I will say the placement rate is very less until now, but the college is in the development state for I hope that in the near future, college will bring more companies.
content.Infrastructure: College- The college has been running since 2016 so infrastructure is relatively good and the college is still developing its infrastructure so it will definitely be refined in the future. Our CM visited us and told us that they are going to convert our college into IIT in the near future. Hostel - There is no hostel yet, but a new building is under construction that will serve as a hostel and will be ready within the next 2-3 years. But there are PGs available nearby which cost almost 6-8k per month. And more PG buildings are under construction.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Totally satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: Almost 80% students are placed in different companies. Students mostly get a minimum package of INR 3 lacs and an average of INR 5 lacs. Companies like Mindtree, Tata, Varroc, and others are here to take students and give them a good package; there are other different companies for other branches.
content.Infrastructure: The college is under construction. Only one building is completed yet, which includes some labs for civil and mechanical engineering, cad labs, and a computer lab. The Wi-Fi mostly works and has good speed. There is no hostel or canteen yet. But soon it'll open.

reviews.review_text: There is no hostel facility for the students or even for the teachers. There is only a single building that contains all of the B.Tech branches, departments. The labs and classrooms are not so good. The classrooms are burning hot in the summer, and in the labs no computer system even works properly.

reviews.review_heading: The college have limited sources and facilities are good but bad placement.
reviews.review_text: Our college does not have proper classrooms for our department. The library is adequate, but some of the labs are not properly maintained. The college does not have hostel or food facilities, and sports and games are not properly maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with all the things in here.
reviews.review_text: We have a Wi-Fi which do not work. No gaming equipment will be given if you want to practice. And hostel facilities are not available here; you have to be in PG or somewhere else. I have taken admission here and thought that it is a government college so it must be bigger than usual. And what did I get. ? The main building of this college is the only building we have. No need to take admission here.

reviews.review_heading: College Needs Improvement to be Worthy of Titles IIT in the Future.
reviews.review_text: College- The college has been running since 2016 so infrastructure is relatively good and the college is still developing its infrastructure so it will definitely be refined in the future. Our CM visited us and told us that they are going to convert our college into IIT in the near future. Hostel - There is no hostel yet, but a new building is under construction that will serve as a hostel and will be ready within the next 2-3 years. But there are PGs available nearby which cost almost 6-8k per ...

reviews.review_heading: Totally satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: The college is under construction. Only one building is completed yet, which includes some labs for civil and mechanical engineering, cad labs, and a computer lab. The Wi-Fi mostly works and has good speed. There is no hostel or canteen yet. But soon it'll open.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: It is a government college. It provides all facilities for sports like table tennis, badminton, cricket, football, etc. Wi-Fi facility is available 24X7 in our college. We have a computer lab.

reviews.review_heading: Poor faculty quality, most teachers lack proper experience.
reviews.review_text: Everything is average. There is no hostel, mess, or canteen. Our department has facilities such as Wi-Fi, computer labs, classrooms, and a library. But they are not well-maintained and sometimes lack proper equipment. Labs have limited systems and outdated software. Classrooms are average with no modern setup. Students have to manage food and stay on their own. There is no playground or sports facility. This makes extracurricular activities very limited. Medical facilities are also not available...

reviews.review_heading: My college is good college with the best memorable moments and average placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure were available for this course. Also, Wi-Fi was available and labs were good. Classrooms were also there. Library was also there. All facilities were there in the hostel. Sports were also there at my college. Canteen was there.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college, good faculty but placement shortage and infrastructure is small.
reviews.review_text: I personally like the faculty it is good and the college infrastructure is also good, college provide us Wi-Fi in very classes, various labs regarding subjects, libraries also and in classrooms college provide projectors for study. One think I suggest is ventilation in classrooms in summer it is very hot.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dr. A. P. J Abdul Kalam Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: There is no hostel in our college. There are many PGs near our college. They have Wi-Fi. Classrooms are very good. They have sufficient lights, fans, and projectors for a good learning experience.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is nice but has poor faculty.
reviews.review_text: College is nice.

college_info.college_name: Satya Group of Institutions: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary:
The JEE Main 2026 registration for session 2 has closed for Satya Group of Institutions admission to BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Satya Group of Institutions:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Satya Group of Institutions offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech, BBA and UG Diploma. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Satya Group of Institutions offers M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. The fees for Satya Group of Institutions courses range between INR 56,100 to 2,30,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Satya Group of Institutions is a good institution for UG Diploma, B.E. / B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech, BBA, After 10th Diploma courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialization at Satya Group of Institutions are Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering.
faqs.question: Are there any specializations offered by Satya Group of Institutions?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: I am dissatisfied because of false placement promises of the college.

review_content.Placements: The college does not provide placements. This year not a single company visited our college for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs are equipped with computers, and that's the biggest accomplishment as those computers don't have the required software for students to learn. So either bring your own laptop or learn from external sources. Quality of the food served in the canteen is very low.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers in our college are relatively helpful and knowledgeable. But the course curriculum will not provide you with a job. To get a job, you need to learn from external sources. Their teaching quality is average as only a few teachers actually know what they are teaching.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: I enjoyed a lot in the college because of good faculty, facilities, and placements provided in 2015.

review_content.Placements: Placements for my senior batch are quite good. Around 60% of the students got placed. The highest salary package offered was 2.4 LPA, the lowest package was 1.2 LPA, and the average package offered was 1.8 LPA. Companies that visited the campus are Microsoft, Mahindra, IBM, etc. Roles offered to the students are general manager, developer, assistant engineer, etc. Around 75% of the students got internships. There is a placement cell, and it is useful for us.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities provided in our college are very good. All the facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, a library, medical facilities and sports facilities are available. Labs and classrooms are well-maintained. Quality of food in the canteen is somewhat better. Hostel rooms are good. I didn't face any infrastructure related issue during my tenure at the college.

review_summary.college_name: Satya Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college for students who have financial problems and want to complete their degree.

content.Placements: It was not a good college for the placement purpose because this college provides fake placements. However, in this college, there was a separate placement cell and placement faculty members, but they do not prepare students well for facing interviews.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college was very good, and there was a good college building. Classrooms were well-designed with furniture and projectors along with the camera facility and Wi-Fi. Hostel, canteen, mess and food facilities were good at this college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: The management on the campus should be good. Teachers are always ready to fight.

content.Placements: Our college did not provide any placements. Only BPO companies were coming for placement. Most of the students leave the company after joining because they want to work as programmers and not as support executives. I think if you want such a job, then don't opt for this college.
content.Infrastructure: During the time of admission, the authorities will tell you that you can use the Wi-Fi of this college, but you can't use it without permission of the IT department. They misbehave with students. Don't choose this college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied because of false placement promises of the college.

content.Placements: The college does not provide placements. This year not a single company visited our college for placements.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are equipped with computers, and that's the biggest accomplishment as those computers don't have the required software for students to learn. So either bring your own laptop or learn from external sources. Quality of the food served in the canteen is very low.
content.Faculty: Teachers in our college are relatively helpful and knowledgeable. But the course curriculum will not provide you with a job. To get a job, you need to learn from external sources. Their teaching quality is average as only a few teachers actually know what they are teaching.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I enjoyed a lot in the college because of good faculty, facilities, and placements provided in 2015.

content.Placements: Placements for my senior batch are quite good. Around 60% of the students got placed. The highest salary package offered was 2.4 LPA, the lowest package was 1.2 LPA, and the average package offered was 1.8 LPA. Companies that visited the campus are Microsoft, Mahindra, IBM, etc. Roles offered to the students are general manager, developer, assistant engineer, etc. Around 75% of the students got internships. There is a placement cell, and it is useful for us.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities provided in our college are very good. All the facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, a library, medical facilities and sports facilities are available. Labs and classrooms are well-maintained. Quality of food in the canteen is somewhat better. Hostel rooms are good. I didn't face any infrastructure related issue during my tenure at the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2013
individual_reviews.title: I'm absolutely satisfied with the faculty and infrastructure.

content.Placements: Placements in our college were good enough. Many companies visited our college for placements. The placement rate of our batch and our senior batch was 80%. Companies like Wipro, HCL, E-Trade Services, Infosys, and Tech Mahindra, visited the campus to offer jobs with good salary packages. International placement opportunities are also provided in Satya Group of Institutions.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good. The college provides opportunities to play all sports. Facilities like laboratories and canteen are available. The campus environment is very good, and the campus has a lot of greenery. Hostel and gym facilities are available within the campus. It provides medical facilities in emergency cases.

admission_overview.college_name: Satya Group of Institutions Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_process.title: Satya Group of Institutions Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Satya Group of Institutions admissions are entrance-based. The institute accepts scores in JEE Main, MAT, and HSTES, etc.Satya Group of Institutionsoffers courses at UG level in Engineering and Business and Management Studies stream. The institute offers B.E. / B.Tech for 3 years in various specialisations. Candidates can fill out the application form online for admission.

The total tuition fees for UG course isINR 1,65,000 - 2,30,000. Aspirants have to pay the programme fees at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the institute. The total fees may also include other components such as caution deposit, hostel fees, etc.

courses_data.name: Satya Group of Institutions B.E. / B.Tech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Satya Group of Institutions admissions are on a merit basis and students need not appear for any entrance test. The duration of the programme is 3 - 4 years. Eligible candidates can submit the required documents and register for the course. Below is the eligibility to join Satya Group of Institutions: Eligibility Criteria

Candidates are shortlisted for the MBA/PGDM programme based on their performance in the entrance exam. Candidates who qualify in the admission process are eligible to secure their seat in the 2 years programme.

reviews.review_text: All the blocks in the college are provided with Wi-Fi facility. All the classrooms are good. The library has all the books related to courses, and they issue books to students. Sports and games facilities are also provided in the college. Labs have all the instruments for the students to do practicals. There is a canteen in the college. Hostel rooms are also good. I haven't faced any issues related to infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: A good college if you are looking for a low budget college.
reviews.review_text: It has a great infrastructure with awesome sports facilities and entertainment facilities. It is probably one of the best in the country if not the best. Good hostel rooms are there but accommodation is a problem and still. Canteens are good. The quality of labs and classes is best.

reviews.review_heading: College is worth of money means the fee of college is less than it gives to its student overall.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, it has 2 main buildings for institution and one big building for hostel all the labs are in basement which makes it better infrastructure and also its main building is good and filled with playgrounds and parks for purposes. There is a cricket ground here and also court of basketball, lawn tennis, foot ball and many others sport, it also has a canteen and gyming area.

reviews.review_heading: I am the topper of civil, 2015 batch. I had no benefits with this college.
reviews.review_text:
Wi-Fi and library facilities are good. The classrooms are also good. The labs quality is below average. The canteen food is average.
I don't know about the hostel life as I was a local person. But, I used to go to Noida SAIB centre where the food quality was very poor.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with everything, its atmosphere, faculty, students.
reviews.review_text: This college has no good infrastructure, not even satisfactory. Labs are not well maintained. The classes are not up to the student's standard. There is not a good and healthy atmosphere in and around the college. There is a boys hostel in college which is also almost damaged, and no proper maintenance is provided to the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Worth for money because fees is Rs. 50,000 and facilities justifies it.
reviews.review_text: The college has two buildings, and one is for administration purpose, senior students of B.Tech and department of management. The second building is for B.Tech first-year students and diploma department. The classrooms are under CCTV surveillance, and there is a hostel building which available for boys in a college campus, but girls hostel is ten km far away from the college.

reviews.review_heading: You will see a change in your life if you take admission here.
reviews.review_text: There is only a building in the name of infrastructure. Classrooms have only boards and benches. There are projectors in 2 or 3 classrooms. They will show you the A/C classrooms during your admission, but there are no facilities in reality. Students aren't provided with any free lecture to play sports, you have to leave one lecture to go and play games.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, medical facilities, and sports are available in the campus. The quality of the labs is pretty much good. The food is good in the canteen. The hostel rooms are good. I didn't face any problem in this college. All the staff are helpful for me. The campus crowd is good, the annual fest is enjoyable, and the network connectivity is good on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: My college has good faculty, it has it's own plant so placement and infrastructure overall is good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available in our college is CCTV cameras in every classroom and labs, Wi-Fi enabled campus, hostel, 24 hours internet connectivity, transportation facility from Delhi-NCR, well-maintained library, sports and games are also available, and medical facilities too. The quality of the labs and classrooms are well-maintained, neat and clean also. The quality of the food available in the canteen is also good. The hostel rooms are also well-maintained. I didn't face any infrastructure rel...

reviews.review_heading: Cooperative faculty, okay placements, quite good campus, worst environment, that is all I can say
reviews.review_text: Quite a good infrastructure. There so many labs and students can learn things practically. It has a very good library and all books are available, you don’t need to buy books. Classes are okay. Overall, it is fine, not so great but not so worst either. Wi-Fi is available but the canteen is the worst part. Sports activities are conducted every semester. There are so many extra co-curricular activities conducted by the college every year.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is a private college. Many students are from nearby areas that is fine.

content.Placements: In the fourth year, students are eligible for campus placements. TCS visited the college and hired 20 students. In my college, the highest package is 25 LPA. 75% of students attended placements. After getting a degree, they get jobs. In this college, recently TCS came and offered placements for some students who do not have backlogs and score a good CGPA. I have done a project named diabetics prediction. It also gives a good outcome.
content.Infrastructure: We have a fest and an annual fest. Both vary but one will be at the end of the year and one is around March. The library does not have many books. Whenever we go to take some books, they will be already with students as there will be 2 or 3 books. Facilities are good. Sports are better because we have an inter-college volleyball championship in our college. There are IEDC and IEEE clubs.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely a good college.

content.Placements: Musaliar college is one of the famous colleges in the district. The college provides decent placements for students. Famous recruiting companies are TCS, Tata, etc.
content.Infrastructure: College is surrounded by trees and plants. There are 5 departments in the college. All the departments have Wi-Fi.
content.Faculty: All the faculty members are well experienced in their subjects. Faculty members provide notes and help us with our doubts. Faculty members are good. Teachers guide students and provide extra classes as well.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It's a pretty good college.

content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are really good. Moreover, our college has a natural ambiance due to the abundance of plants and trees, creating a connection with nature. Classrooms and the library are also very well-maintained. As I am not in the hostel, I don't have information about hostel food and facilities.

individual_reviews.title: I do not recommend this college for a good college life.

content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available on campus. Our second-year classroom is not good. Hostel doesn't have a mess facility. Most of the bathroom doesn't have lights. Hostel warden is rude and disrespectful. Labs are good. Library doesn't have all books. Canteen food is not good. Sports are not supported in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Faculties and curriculum are absolutely fine. They also provides better campus and infrastructure.

content.Placements: Our college offers better placements. Many big companies are interested to accept students from our college. They also provide better salary. Training cell helps us to develop our communication skills and other skills. This helps us to attend our interview confidently.
content.Infrastructure: This college provides very good infrastructure. Wi- fi is available in every classes. Labs are well-equipped. Classrooms are provided with every basic necessities and every classrooms are provided with a projector. Hostels are affordable to every students.

reviews.review_text: This college provides very good infrastructure. Wi- fi is available in every classes. Labs are well-equipped. Classrooms are provided with every basic necessities and every classrooms are provided with a projector. Hostels are affordable to every students.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best college for studies.
reviews.review_text: In this college, chemistry, computer, physics, electronics, and mechanical laboratories are available. A library, hostel, language laboratory, canteen, conference hall, mosque, fitness center, amenity room, NSS office, and many facilities are available. Our college has a well-structured basketball ground.

reviews.review_heading: It is a wonderful college. It has beautiful scenery, and it is on a hilltop.
reviews.review_text: The college provides free Wi-Fi facility for the students. Enough books are available in our college library. Labs and classrooms are well-sophisticated. Quality of food served on the college campus and mess is good. The college provides amenity centres for both girls and boys. Medical facilities are available. There is enough space for playing sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: It is an awesome college in Pathanamthitta.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is better. The college is constructed creatively without causing any harm to the environment. The college has plenty of trees and greenery, which provides a good atmosphere. The college is very clean and eco-friendly. Departments are arranged excellently.

reviews.review_heading: Ensures 100% future stability.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is covered with more than 700 number of trees which provide good and fresh air. The entire campus is supplied with high-speed Wi-Fi. All classrooms are digitalised. A well occuppied library with thousand varieties of books. A fully loaded medical room.

reviews.review_heading: College is good but not the system.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not up to the mark. The buildings and Washrooms area could be better? Hostel facility is also poor? There is no scope for sports, and no medical facilities either. Canteen is very pathetic lizard is found in water jar, so taste good.

review_summary.college_name: IES Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college for education.

content.Placements: 70 % of the students were selected in very big companies during the placements in our college. The salary packages offered were from 1.5LPA - 6LPA and they are selected for different roles. The main role is for the programmer posts.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. We have a big computer lab and classrooms. The grounds are big enough to play games and much more. The whole building is well-maintained and clean, and even the bathrooms are hygiene. Chilled RO water is always available for students to drink and bus facility to the whole city is available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech.) (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Very disciplined campus. Women's safety is the first aim.

content.Placements: I completed BE in civil engineering. If your branch is computer Science and engineering or electrical and communication or electrical and electronics, then this college is best in central India because chances of placement are very high and best companies such as TCS, Infosys, IBM, Wipro, SAP LAB and many more. The percentage of the placement of above branches is always more than 90% every year.
content.Infrastructure: On the matter of infrastructure, this college has the certificate of Indian green building council Hyderabad. Cleanliness is awesome. The Wi-Fi is available but not at all place. Different labs for the different branches are also available. Even according to the subject, the labs, equipment are available. The medical facilities are also available. Food available in the canteen is not good. Food does not have a good taste.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech.) (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: The college is good for its infrastructure, but please do self-assessment carefully.

content.Placements: The placement wise, the institution provides a decent number of jobs to computer science students. Honestly, you won't find any big brand names within the campus regarding placement, but if you are a CSE student, then you may keep some hopes, but for other branches, there are very few opportunities here, and this is 100% true.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very nice and well-maintained. It is a nice campus, and the environment is also good. Overall, the showpiece part is very nice. Computer labs are well-maintained and have an ample number of the system, but for other branches, labs are just good for basic subject practicals.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech.) (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: The best college you can find in whole Bhopal.

content.Placements: The placements take place every time nearly for about 2 months. We have seen many seniors taking placements. The companies like Zensar Technology, IBM, Microsoft, Ultratech Cement, Birla. F Group, Adani Group visit here. There have been placements from a minimum amount of 5 LPA to an average of 10 LPA, and to the highest of 47 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: There is a great infrastructure on our campus. There are many computer labs, games rooms, yoga rooms, indoor games room, gym rooms, workout rooms, etc. There has been regularity in this term. The hostel rooms have been kept very clean. You get delicious food. You can't come late. There are no infrastructure related problems faced by anyone.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech.) (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Our college has a good placement record.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are good, and there are many campus placements in our college. Some companies which visited our college are Piaggio, Accurate Steel, TCS, etc. There are many placements for CS students as compares to others. Overall, placements are good for all branches than other colleges in Bhopal.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good, and it is spread across 70 acres. All games are held in our college, and lab facilities are also available. There are five buildings in it, and all buildings have approximately 50 classrooms per building. Our college is awarded as a green campus and tobacco-free from Madhya Pradesh government.

admission_process.title: IES Group of Institutions Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: IES Group of Institutions offers entrance-based admissions. It offers various courses at the UG, PG and After 10th level, such as B.E. / B.Tech, D.Pharma, M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Admissions are based on certain exams scores, such as CBSE 10th, CBSE 12th, and MPBSE 10th.
The application forms are available online on the official website. Check below for more details on IES Group of Institutions admissions 2025.

There are a total of930seats available for this programme.

The university offers the course in 2 specialisations, including Finance and Sales & Marketing. Moreover, the selected candidates must payINR 55,000at the time of admission forIES Group of Institutions MBA/PGDMprogramme.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: It is a very good college because of good faculty members and good placements.

review_content.Placements: Above 60% of students were placed in the course. The highest salary package offered was 8.5 LPA and the lowest salary package offered was 2.6 LPA. Fukoku, Mahindra, and Bajaj were the top recruiting companies. About 70% of students got internships from our course in Bajaj, Maruti Suzuki, and Honda. Production engineer and production engineer trainee were the roles offered in many companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college had Wi-Fi, labs, a book bank, and a library. They had the best quality hostel. They provided good quality food, canteen, and medical facility. There was the best ground for outdoor sports and games. Outdoor grounds were very huge to play games like cricket and kabbadi. Every year, our college organises an annual social gathering. During this function, celebrities visit our campus. During the annual gathering, many activities were performed.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: This college is absolutely good for students, and they can choose it.

review_content.Placements: About 80% of students got placed from our course. Marketing and also technical companies recruit students from our college. The salary package varies per student as per companies requirements. Students got internships in marketing and also in technical companies. Roles offered to us depend on respective companies requirements.
review_content.Infrastructure: I like our college's infrastructure, which is good. Wi-Fi facility is quite available for students and teachers. Labs are build in a sequence manner, and lots of instruments are available in labs. Classrooms are also nice with proper sequence. The library is situated on the ground floor, which is essential for students. Other facilities are also available in our college.

overview_faqs.question: Is Jagadambha College Of Engineering and Technology a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Jagadambha College Of Engineering and Technology is a well-known institution for M.E./M.Tech, B.Tech courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Jagadambha College Of Engineering and Technology has a rating of 3.2 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.5 on campuslife, 2.6 on placements, 3.3 on faculty and 3.3 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: JCOET Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the faculty, but placements in 2023 were poor. The infrastructure was good.

content.Placements: Placement offered by the college included only 5-6 companies that visited for recruitment. The salary package offered was 3.8 LPA. The top recruiting company was Mahindra, which was the only company that offered high-paying placements. In my class of around 70 students, only 7 to 8 students got internships in fields like software testing, etc. I believe the top roles offered by companies included software testing, software development, and application designing.
content.Infrastructure: Our college classrooms were good, and campus was too, but labs have outdated software in the computer labs. Wi-Fi was free in the first year, but after that, it was closed for students. Library is good, with a focused environment that helps you concentrate. Sports activities only happened in the first year; after COVID, no sports events were held. Canteen quality was not so good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Review of Jagadambha College Of Engineering and Technology.

content.Placements: Almost 50% of students got placed in our college. Placements are above average. Top recruiting companies are Infosys, TCS, Wipro, etc. Almost 100% of students got internships. The highest salary package offered is 20 LPA. The average salary package offered is 10 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides facilities like labs, Wi-Fi, and a library. All labs are developed. All books like syllabus books, other language books, and computer learning language books are available in the library. All classrooms have projectors. Canteen is available in our college. The food served in the canteen is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college because of good faculty members and good placements.

content.Placements: Above 60% of students were placed in the course. The highest salary package offered was 8.5 LPA and the lowest salary package offered was 2.6 LPA. Fukoku, Mahindra, and Bajaj were the top recruiting companies. About 70% of students got internships from our course in Bajaj, Maruti Suzuki, and Honda. Production engineer and production engineer trainee were the roles offered in many companies.
content.Infrastructure: Our college had Wi-Fi, labs, a book bank, and a library. They had the best quality hostel. They provided good quality food, canteen, and medical facility. There was the best ground for outdoor sports and games. Outdoor grounds were very huge to play games like cricket and kabbadi. Every year, our college organises an annual social gathering. During this function, celebrities visit our campus. During the annual gathering, many activities were performed.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: This college is absolutely good for students, and they can choose it.

content.Placements: About 80% of students got placed from our course. Marketing and also technical companies recruit students from our college. The salary package varies per student as per companies requirements. Students got internships in marketing and also in technical companies. Roles offered to us depend on respective companies requirements.
content.Infrastructure: I like our college's infrastructure, which is good. Wi-Fi facility is quite available for students and teachers. Labs are build in a sequence manner, and lots of instruments are available in labs. Classrooms are also nice with proper sequence. The library is situated on the ground floor, which is essential for students. Other facilities are also available in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It does good publicity. Still, it is a poor college with pathetic teachers, worst infrastructure.

content.Placements: Placements in our college were good. The starting salary package offered is from Rs. 96,000 per annum to 3.2 LPA. We have to go to other prestigious institutions for off-campus placements and directly to companies for a job. You can get placed, but you only need to be competitive. I have qualified for all interviews except for 2 or 3 companies, but I didn't do any job because of the low salary. Still, after college through off-campus, I got a very good job with a salary package of 6 LPA. Our college is in a rural area, so none of the companies wants to visit here. If you are from civil or mechanical engineering, then you won't get your branch job for placements.

college_info.intro: JJTU University popular programmes are MBA and BTech. MBA and BTech students are placed in top companies at the top positions. Shri Jagdish Prasad Jhabarmal Tibrewala University BTech is provided in four specialisations, namely Civil Engineering, Computer Science and Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, and Mechanical Engineering. overview_faqs.question: What is Shri Jagdishprasad Jhabarmal Tibrewala University famous for?
overview_faqs.answer: Shri Jagdishprasad Jhabarmal Tibrewala University (SJJTU) came into its pious existence in 2009. The university has been marching ahead on its uphill journey since its inception. It has since become synonymous with dedication, commitment, and service to the community in the remote area of the Shekhawati region of Rajasthan.

overview_faqs.answer: Yes, BTech at JJTU University is worth pursuing. paragraphs: Shri Jagdishprasad Jhabarmal Tibrewala University (JJTU) admissions 2025 are opening soon. The university offers over 144 courses across 16 streams. JJTU admission to PhD courses is based on CET conducted by the university. For all other UG and PG programmes, admission is based on the university entrance exam.

Registration is online for all the courses offered by the university. Candidates can download the application form from the official website of the university. Below-mentioned are details for popular courses along with their eligibility criteria and respective fees related to JJTU admissions 2025:
Course Name
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
PG degree with a minimum of 55% aggregate (50% aggregate for reserved category)
CET/UGC-NET/CSIR-NET
Class 10 or Class 12
Merit-based
Graduation with sports certificate
Graduation in any stream
Class 12 in PCM or PCB
Class 12 with a minimum of 50% aggregate

Shri Jagdishprasad Jhabarmal Tibrewala University (JJTU) admissions for 2025 are opening soon. The university offers over 144 courses across 16 streams. Below is the detailed admission process for JJTU for the year 2025.
Step 1: JJTU Application Process 2025

The JJTU admission process for 2025 starts with the application process. Candidates can download the application form from the university's official website. The duly filled application form must be sent either through post or submitted in person at the concerned department of JJTU. The application fee will be paid online, and candidates must attach the payment slip along with the application form.
Step 2: Selection Rounds
Step 3: Merit List Release & Counselling

After the completion of all the selection rounds, candidates must appear for the counselling process for the respective courses. The university will then release the merit list in various rounds of the selected candidates. Students whose names appear on the merit list need to pay the requisite fee to secure their seat.
lists: PhD Courses:Admission to PhD courses at JJTU is based on the Common Entrance Test (CET) conducted by the university. Candidates who have qualified UGC-NET or CSIR-NET are also eligible.
UG and PG Courses:For all other undergraduate (UG) and postgraduate (PG) programs, admission is based on the university's entrance exam.

faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee for B.Pharma at JJTU?
faqs.answer: JJTU University offers BPharma and BPharma (Lateral Entry) courses. The tuition fee for both the courses is INR 93,500 per semester. faqs.question: What is the course fees for two years MBA in JJTU University?
faqs.answer: The total MBA tuition fee at JJTU University is INR 1.3 lakh . The university charges tuition fees on an annual basis. Besides the tuition fee, students are required to pay a one-time fee of INR 1,000 . Once the selection rounds are completed, selected students may be required to pay the first instalment of the tuition fees. Note: The above-mentioned fee structure is as per the official sources. However, it is indicative and still subject to change.

highlights.summary:
The TNEA 2026 counselling application window is expected to launch in the first week of May 2026 for Sir Issac Newton College of Engineering and Technology admission to BE/BTech courses.

A few more updates are given below:

reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied with my overall college life. No proper guidance and placements.

review_content.Placements: 10% of students only placed in my batch and that is also not my core company. No proper guidance. Only the manufacturing company comes for the placement. In our course, there are so many roles and software fields like data scientist, data analyst, and software developed extra.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has a good canteen facility and a good lab. Classrooms are not proper but now it's developing little by little. The library is also nice. College buses are not good, not enough for all the students. They don't improve that but now they have developed the overall infrastructure of the college a little bit.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: In our college, there is good faculty and good quality to study as well.

review_content.Placements: Our college management is that 80 percent of students are placed in our course. Data management, Data scientists, Artificial creator, and so many top roles are offered in my course. Here, 70 percent of students got internships from our course in college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of my college campus and the classroom, hostel is good to use. The cleaners clear the classrooms, restrooms, hostel, and college campus also. The facility of the mess and canteen is good, and medical facilities are available in my college. Sports and games are also good in my college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Honest review of Sir Issac Newton College of Engineering and Technology.

review_content.Placements: 100% of students are placed in my course. This college gives excellent placements, with an average package of 2.5LPA . Companies like JBM, TVS, and Nissan are among the recruiters. Above 50% of students got internships in top companies and CIT. Top roles are offered in any courses, which is insane.
review_content.Infrastructure: Especially BE has good facilities in the labs. Labs are highly updated, making it easy for students to study practically. Wi-Fi is also available. Classrooms are wide, and even 100 students can sit freely. There is a unique library for engineering students, which has a wide variety of books.

faqs.answer: Sir Issac Newton College of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.M.E./M.TechCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.

admission_overview.college_name: SKIPS University Admission 2025: Fee, Dates, Eligibility & Application

paragraphs: SKIPS Universityoffers various UG, PG and Diploma programmes such as BTech, BBA, PGDM, MSc, and others. Themodeof theSKIPS Universityisonline. Further, admissions to various courses are based onmerit and entrance exam scoressuch as the SSAT.

Course admissions require students to meet certain eligibility criteria based on preferred course and apply online before the last date of application. Admissions are not only based on entrance exams but also merit, group discussion and personal interview round. One can view the table below for the eligibility and selection criteria of variousSKIPS University courses:
Course Name
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Class 12 or equivalent with a minimum aggregate of 50% from a recognised board
SSAT + GDPI + Extracurricular Activities (if any)
Class 12 or equivalent with a minimum aggregate of 50% from a recognised board
SSAT + GDPI + Extracurricular Activities (if any)
Graduation with a minimum aggregate of 60% from a recognised university
CAT/CMAT/XAT/ATMA/MAT/GMAT+ GDPI + Extracurricular Activities (if any)
Class 12 or equivalent with a minimum aggregate of 50% from a recognised board
SSAT + GDPI + Extracurricular Activities (if any)
1. Application Process
Students must apply online before the last date of application by filling out an application form and paying any required application fees.
2. Selection Process

SKIPS University admissions to various courses are based onmerit and entrance exam scores. For admission to most programmes, SKIPS accepts theSKIPS Scholastic Aptitude Testscores. For PGDM admissions students must appear forCAT/CMAT/XAT/ATMA/MAT/GMAT. After entrance exams students appear for further GDPI rounds for admission. Other criteria include Extracurricular Activities and Merit.
3. Admission Confirmation

It is necessary that the candidate hold the required documents during form filling and admission confirmation after being selected. The documents are required for verification purposes. Students must also pay admission fees to confirm their admission/secure seat.

reviews_list.review_title: We gained a lot of knowledge. They conducted an industrial visit every six months for us.

review_content.Placements: More than 40 students from our batch got placed. Topmost recruiting companies for our course are HCL and Neeyamo. I got selected in Neeyamo Enterprise as an associate, and my designation was service delivery executive benefits. They offered me a salary of Rs. 15,000 per month. I have learned a lot in this role for the past three years.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college environment is good. Hostel facilities are best compared to other colleges. The food served was awesome, and they also provided free 24 hours Wi-Fi facility on the campus. Our college has one of the best libraries. It also provided a lot of opportunities in sports activities.

overview_faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

review_summary.college_name: Solamalai College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: We gained a lot of knowledge. They conducted an industrial visit every six months for us.

content.Placements: More than 40 students from our batch got placed. Topmost recruiting companies for our course are HCL and Neeyamo. I got selected in Neeyamo Enterprise as an associate, and my designation was service delivery executive benefits. They offered me a salary of Rs. 15,000 per month. I have learned a lot in this role for the past three years.
content.Infrastructure: Our college environment is good. Hostel facilities are best compared to other colleges. The food served was awesome, and they also provided free 24 hours Wi-Fi facility on the campus. Our college has one of the best libraries. It also provided a lot of opportunities in sports activities.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2012

content.Other: Now they have new management. So good to go here. Check whether the placements have arranged newly or not. Previously they don't have good placement. All the faculties are good in their knowledge. Don’t except the infrastructure. Campus life would be good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2013

content.Other: College has a good reputation with decent placements. As of now we are day scholars so no hostel facility, staffs and lecturers are good with high experience. Coming to academics we don't have much work to do, all we need to do is completing the course. Apart from classes we do have several workshops from various industry experts. Cultural fest and sports are really awesome here. We enjoyed a lot in the course of four year time with loads of fun with friends.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied with my college's infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Placement is very bad in our college. They don't invite any company for recruitment. But they say that 100% students are placed. In our batch, not a single person was placed. We have to pay a consultancy fee of Rs. 8000.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is a total waste. We just have 2 buildings. Our hostel facility and the canteen is very bad. Good quality food was not provided. The buildings are under construction. We don't even have proper lab facility.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: The college has good infrastructure, supportive faculty, and strong placement opportunities.

review_content.Placements: I am from the artificial intelligence and data science department batch of 2027. In our course, around 85 percent of students were placed through campus recruitment. About 70 percent of students received internships during the course and many converted those into full time offers. The top roles offered included software developer, data analyst, back-end engineer and QA tester. The placement support and training provided by the college played a key role in this outcome.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure: Our department had modern computer labs with high-speed internet. Classrooms were clean and equipped with projectors. Wi-Fi was available throughout the campus. The library had a wide range of books and online resources. The overall environment supported both learning and research. Hostel and other facilities: Hostel rooms were clean and had basic furniture with good internet. The mess food was hygienic and served a balanced diet.

admission_overview.college_name: Sri Venkateswaraa College of Technology Admission 2025: Application, Eligibility, and Selection

admission_process.title: Sri Venkateswaraa College of Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Sri Venkateswaraa College of Technology admission 2025 is open.SVCTadmission is both entrance-based and merit-based. This institute is known for its four-year, full-time/part-time, flagship BE/ BTech programme that offers admission based on performance of the candidate in TNEA. SVCT admission cycle for BE/ BTech starts with the commencement of TNEA registrations. Apart from BE/ BTech, SVCT also offers ME course in CSE and Communications Systems. Candidates are shortlisted for SVCT ME programme based on their merit the qualifying exam. Read on to know more about SVCT admission.

Sri Venkateswaraa College of Technology offers engineering courses at the undergraduate and postgraduate levels. Candidates seeking admission must visit the official website of the college to apply online. Given below is the eligibility and selection criteria for SVCT courses:

Sri Venkateswaraa College of Technology course admissions 2025 are either done based on merit or entrance exams. Check below the complete SVCT admission process:Application:The mode of application is online. Candidates must register online and then fill out the online application form.Selection rounds:Candidates seeking admission to BTech course need to appear for the TNEA entrance exam. For MTech, candidates are shortlisted on the basis of merit secured in the qualifying exam.Admission confirmation:Once the selection rounds are done, the shortlisted candidates are called for document verification. Aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the college/university.

review_summary.college_name: Satyasai Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied teaching quality, infrastructure, and all remaining points except placements.

content.Placements: Maximum 90% of students are placed in this course. The highest package is 3 LPA. The lowest salary is 2 LPA. The average package is 2.50 LPA. No such companies recruit in this college, just state home companies. There are no internships at this college. Roles offered are developer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of our college is one of the best. It is situated in a good location. All classrooms are air-conditioned, cleaned, and connected through high-speed internet. All classrooms have projector. Hostel is also very good. Both boys and girls hostels are available. Food is also very good and hygiene. There is also a playground, overall very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: This college is a very good college for engineering students from every point of view.

content.Placements: It had a very good workshop for practical experience. It had a very skilled faculty. Top recruiting companies like Infosys, Mahindra, Tata Power, IBM, Bajaj, Maruti, etc. I thanked the college for organizing everything very good for students. Roads were very good to reach the college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was very good, near the sea beach. The newly built hostel accommodation was good, and the food served was tasty. Labs were very good, with Wi-Fi facilities. The road was in good condition to reach the college, with a well-furnished college bus. In the hostel, there was a single room available. The hostel accommodation and food were also very nice.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Satyasai Engineering College, Campus with average rate .

content.Placements: College campus is good but the placement is really poor because in Satyasai, there are not much opportunities for various companies. About internship it is a little bit of helpful but not that much. But the Campus system should be here so that all the good students can be more profitable.
content.Infrastructure: Classes are okay with various lectures but the Wi-Fi it's not there and sometimes the facility of sports is irrelevant. But about the mess and labs and classrooms it's fine and really doing good. All the foods you require is available here without any harmness.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely loved to my college.

content.Placements: 70 percent students are placed in our college. The lowest package in our course. Yes top recruiting companies in our college. 75 percent students got internship.
content.Infrastructure: All are available in our college like All department, all practical labs, canteens, ground, medical facilities, Library, good faculty, and the classrooms all are neat and clean.
content.Faculty: Yes all teachers are helpful, qualified and knowledgeable. The teaching quality are good all the faculty. Semester are passed away good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: LOVE MY COLLEGE, improve placement and faculty.

content.Placements: 50%-60% of students were placed in my course (Electrical Engineering). The highest package offered in our course is more than 5 Lakh+ per annum. And the lowest package offered is Rs 2 lakh+ per annum. If we consider average package than it is 3.5 Lakh+ per annum. TATA, Birla, Optcl, etc. companies came for placements. Approximately, 40% of students got internship from our course from TATA company. Senior Executive Engineer position was provided to most of the students.
content.Infrastructure: The college environment is beautiful and clean. There are so many facilities available for our courses like 24*7 Wi-Fi, Hitech Electrical Lab, AC classroom with Projector, and a Peaceful library with various books. Quality, Quantity & Hygienic food are always in top notch of our hostel. Canteen is clean and sanitized always. First-aid is available in our college and hostel. Our college arrange intermediate tournament between another college and various sports. College do various indoor and outdoor games.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: If the percentile is low or the college is close to home.

review_content.Placements: The placement ratio is good because most students fail before entering their final year. So very few students can apply for placements. Everyone gets placed, but the package is higher. It is okay overall because if you are not able to get a good placement through the college. You can also participate in university placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are okay, not too much. There is Wi-Fi throughout the academic building. There is a library. Classrooms are also okay, but you will not see classrooms like those in IIT or NIT. You get normal school-type labs. The computer lab is absolutely great. The hostel is normal. You do not get a bed but a locker. The hostel is open, and you get a triple-sharing room in the first or second year.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: College is very good in all the fields.

review_content.Placements: At my college, 80% of students were placed. The highest package is 10 lacs per annum. Top recruiting companies are coming for computer science and engineering and electronics and communications engineering. In Wipro Company, many students were placed last year.
review_content.Infrastructure: Academic facilities and campuswide Wi-Fi coverage are offered. The labs are well-equipped for computer science engineering, electronics and communication engineering, electrical engineering, mechanical engineering, and civil engineering. The quality of food in the mess and canteen is good, and medical facilities are always provided. Sports and games are conducted every month by SAC members. In our hostel, yoga classes are always conducted by the principal.

content.Infrastructure: Our college has the best facilities and infrastructure. There are Wi-Fi labs, classrooms, and a library with air conditioning. All books are available in the library. The hostel rooms are of the highest quality, and the food is delicious.
content.Faculty: The teachers are very helpful and well qualified. They are very knowledgeable, and they taught us very well. The semester exams were not too tough, but they were not too easy either. However, the teachers taught us so well that we didn't have to worry about the semester paper.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: If the percentile is low or the college is close to home.

content.Placements: The placement ratio is good because most students fail before entering their final year. So very few students can apply for placements. Everyone gets placed, but the package is higher. It is okay overall because if you are not able to get a good placement through the college. You can also participate in university placements.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are okay, not too much. There is Wi-Fi throughout the academic building. There is a library. Classrooms are also okay, but you will not see classrooms like those in IIT or NIT. You get normal school-type labs. The computer lab is absolutely great. The hostel is normal. You do not get a bed but a locker. The hostel is open, and you get a triple-sharing room in the first or second year.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: College is very good in all the fields.

content.Placements: At my college, 80% of students were placed. The highest package is 10 lacs per annum. Top recruiting companies are coming for computer science and engineering and electronics and communications engineering. In Wipro Company, many students were placed last year.
content.Infrastructure: Academic facilities and campuswide Wi-Fi coverage are offered. The labs are well-equipped for computer science engineering, electronics and communication engineering, electrical engineering, mechanical engineering, and civil engineering. The quality of food in the mess and canteen is good, and medical facilities are always provided. Sports and games are conducted every month by SAC members. In our hostel, yoga classes are always conducted by the principal.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of Government Engineering College, Sheohar.

content.Placements: Good companies visit the campus to hire brilliant students. About 90% of the students got placed last year. The salary packages offered are also good. For placements, students should have a 5 CGPA per semester. All courses offered in our college are good for placements.
content.Infrastructure: Firstly, I'll introduce our library, it's just wow. The library is the best place in our college to study frequently and students can focus on their goals without any disturbances. This library is fully air-conditioned and books for all courses are available. Secondly, in hostels, all the facilities are available like water cooler, geyser, electricity, etc. Inside the hostel, mess is also available and it is neat and clean.

review_summary.college_name: Chhatrapati Shivaji Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: This college is very well for interested students.

content.Placements: I am a student of B.Tech Computer Science branch in csit durg, In this college it provides good placement programs for students and this college is able to arrange programmes for aptitude and reasoning classes for the placements. This college conducts programs for placements with other faculty and also TCS programs. It has also pylons for intern and students who want to learn full stack development.
content.Infrastructure: This college has hostel facility with wonderful mesh. It also provides Wi-Fi internet 1 gb per day jio net. The csit college has a playground not very well but in okay condition. The hostel campus is good and nearby college, so no problems in going to college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: This is very good college for placements. But our campus crowd is average.

content.Placements: Around 80-90% of students are placed in our college. The highest salary package offered is 12 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 2.4 LPA. There are many top recruiting companies for our course like Oracle, H&L, etc. Almost 75% of students get internships in many companies like Pylons, etc. The top roles offered are editing, ethical hacking, etc.
content.Infrastructure: In this college, Wi-Fi is enabled 24X7, and each branch has its laboratories. All classrooms are big, and library is also well arranged. The infrastructure is excellent in this college. Hostel rooms are clean and big. The food served in the hostel is not good. Canteen is small, and they have nothing for lunch. Medical facilities are good. Sports and games are provided in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: You can join this college if you need only academic knowledge.

content.Placements: As it is a third-tier college, we cannot expect much from our college. About 40 to 50% of students are placed. The highest salary package offered is 6 to 8 LPA, the average is 3 to 5 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA. TCS and Capgemini are recruiting companies. Almost 80% of students received internships at Pylons, STPI, and other companies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not so good and needs some improvement. We get books for the whole semester, which is good. Classrooms need improvement. The hostel is average, and the canteen needs to be better because it is a basic shop. They need to show some interest in sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: An average college for education.

content.Placements: 40-50% students were placed although most of them were placed off campus. The highest package offered was 6 LPA and average was 3.5 LPA and the lowest was 2.8 LPA. TCS and wipro were the top recruiters. 10-20% students got internships. Software developer was the major role offered.
content.Infrastructure: Although everything is nice in our college but the library is the best thing we have. Although Wi-Fi stopped working after corona which affected us a lot but classrooms and labs were okay. Never lived in the hostel but my friends told me that the hostel is good. Games and sports are also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: This was the best college in central India till 2016.

content.Placements: For IT and software jobs, there are average opportunities, and those who got a proper job applied for off-campus jobs. For the rest, there is no job opportunity. Only sales and marketing jobs are offered in tier 3 companies.
content.Infrastructure: Although the infrastructure is excellent, there are few facilities available due to a lack of admissions.
content.Faculty: The best faculty members have already left the college, and the new faculty members are completely new in terms of teaching. You can select either sessional or skills. If you're a bookworm, you'll get sessionals but not any skills related to your job or anything. If you choose skills that pay you forever, forget about sessional. You have to maintain attendance as well as bookish knowledge to be a topper.
