description: Chhatrapati Shivaji Institute of Technology cutoff 2025 will be released soon for admission to the BE/BTech courses. In the meantime, aspirants seeking admission can check the sections below to view Chhatrapati Shivaji Institute of Technology cutoff 2024 across different exams, courses, rounds, and categories to understand the cutoff trends. A few more updates are given below:

Chhatrapati Shivaji Institute of Technology CG PET cutoff 2025 has been released for the second round for candidates waiting to get admission to B.E. / B.Tech course. The cutoff list was released category-wise as opening-closing cutoff ranks. The cutoff ranks also varied on the basis of gender, as some reservations were made for Female category students.

CG PET cutoff 2025 is finally out for students seeking admission to various undergraduate engineering courses in the state of Chhattisgarh. Chhatrapati Shivaji Institute of Technology has also released the second round cutoff list for aspiring candidates, based on JEE Main scores and CG PET counselling. The minimum cutoff for admission to any branch was 1221, for candidates belonging to the General HS category. The maximum required cutoff rank is 3331 during Round 2 admission.

The Directorate of Technical Education (DTE) have announced the CG PET 2025 counselling dates online. CG PET 2025 seat allotment results are being announced separately for the different rounds of counselling. Allotment of seats will be done based on the candidate's obtained rank, preferences, category and seat availability. Candidates can check out the important CGPET 2025 datesc in the table below:

Below are the Chhatrapati Shivaji Institute of Technology CG PET consolidated PDFs for students interested in seeking admission to the college for B.E. / B.Tech course. Students can view or download the PDFs to view the round and year-wise cutoff lists.

In this section, candidates can check the cutoff of colleges and specialisations available for admission based on the CG PET latest round cutoff ranks. To do the comparison based on other parameters, such as location, category, etc., students can use the filter provided.

hostel_campus.college_name: Chhatrapati Shivaji Institute of Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Hostel provides all the basic amenities like bed, table, chair and electrical fittings. It has spacious recreation room, round the clock electricity supply with high end generator back-up, several Newspapers as well as Magazines are subscribed and TV is also provided to get student relaxed during leisure and also to get them updated. The Computer Centre and Library are kept open for residents of the hostel.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Volleyball, Kabaddi, Handball, Table Tennis

cafeteria.description: Institute has three different food courts which are canteen in association with “Jalaram”, Coffee Corner (franchisee of Nescafe) and Amul parlour. The full-fledged multi cuisine canteen serves delicious vegetarian recipes at very affordable prices. The cafeteria services are available round the clock at highly reasonable prices and smile. This facility provides Tea / Coffee/Soup/ Cold Drinks and fast Snacks. Amul parlour serve the delicious Amul Products to the students and residents of CSIT premises.

hostel.description: Hostel provides all the basic amenities like bed, table, chair and electrical fittings. It has spacious recreation room, round the clock electricity supply with high end generator back-up, several Newspapers as well as Magazines are subscribed and TV is also provided to get student relaxed during leisure and also to get them updated. The Computer Centre and Library are kept open for residents of the hostel.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Volleyball, Kabaddi, Handball, Table Tennis

labs.description: Available Facilities: Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Mechanical Lab, Refrigeration and Air-Conditioning Lab, Energy Conservation System Lab, Thermodynamics Lab, Internal Combustion Engines Lab, Material Testing Lab, Basic & Advanced Electronics Circuit Lab, Analog & Digital Electronics Circuit Lab, Microprocessor and Interfaces Lab, Structure Network Cabling Lab, Linux Networking Lab, Power Electronics Lab, Electrical circuit Lab, Automatic Control System Lab, Matlab Labs, Sensor and Transducer Lab, Virtual Instrumentation Lab, Optical Instrumentation Lab, Programmable logic controller  lab

reviews.review_heading: This college is very well for interested students.
reviews.review_text: This college has hostel facility with wonderful mesh. It also provides Wi-Fi internet 1 gb per day jio net. The csit college has a playground not very well but in okay condition. The hostel campus is good and nearby college, so no problems in going to college.

reviews.review_heading: This is very good college for placements. But our campus crowd is average.
reviews.review_text: In this college, Wi-Fi is enabled 24X7, and each branch has its laboratories. All classrooms are big, and library is also well arranged. The infrastructure is excellent in this college. Hostel rooms are clean and big. The food served in the hostel is not good. Canteen is small, and they have nothing for lunch. Medical facilities are good. Sports and games are provided in our college.

reviews.review_heading: You can join this college if you need only academic knowledge.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not so good and needs some improvement. We get books for the whole semester, which is good. Classrooms need improvement. The hostel is average, and the canteen needs to be better because it is a basic shop. They need to show some interest in sports.

reviews.review_heading: An average college for education.
reviews.review_text: Although everything is nice in our college but the library is the best thing we have. Although Wi-Fi stopped working after corona which affected us a lot but classrooms and labs were okay. Never lived in the hostel but my friends told me that the hostel is good. Games and sports are also good.

reviews.review_heading: This was the best college in central India till 2016.
reviews.review_text: Although the infrastructure is excellent, there are few facilities available due to a lack of admissions.

reviews.review_heading: CSIT has a great ambience around the campus. The education and placements are great.
reviews.review_text: I am a hosteller, and what I really like here is the environment around the hostel. Our college is quite near to the hostel building, so it's very convenient. The quality of food served in the mess is great, and you will notice that on your day one. The only thing is if you cannot have little spicy food, then you'll have a hard time adjusting to it, but it will be fine as per the time. I had the same problem, but now I am able to adapt to it pretty well. The rooms are clean, and there are no iss...

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college to study after 12th and you can pursue many courses here.
reviews.review_text: We have facilities like Wi-Fi, a library, and separate labs for all courses. There are well-designed classrooms for teaching. Medical facilities are also available. Sports ground is also there to play. Food served is good, and there is also a  canteen. Hostel facilities are fine.

reviews.review_heading: Well honestly college campus was very good.
reviews.review_text: Well the infrastructure of my college is marvelous, there is two canteen and two library, there are two types of facilities in my college one who always want that the student will do good in their future and the other are the one who want to complete their course.

reviews.review_heading: My college have very good infrastructure, It has two great library .
reviews.review_text: Well the infrastructure of my college was very awesome they provide us two library one is AC and other one is non AC both the library looks very nice and peaceful. Taking about the food of the mess, it was the worst. There is no medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college with all the amenities for students to achieve their goals.
reviews.review_text: The campus is equipped with central Wi-Fi. CSIT has best in class library compared to other colleges. Students get access to the library. The college has various clubs in which students can enrol according to their interests and hobbies.

reviews.review_heading: I had a great learning experience.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are available for boys and girls. The campus is huge and is a residential place for faculty. There are labs for all branches. A computer lab is also available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is worth for every penny paid.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good especially the library. Students from other colleges also visit our library. It is the number one library of all the engineering colleges. The food served in the mess is very tasty.

reviews.review_heading: Teachers are well-experienced. Selection can be made via JEE, CG PET or direct admission also.
reviews.review_text: CSIT college is located in the rural area of Kolihapuri Durg. It has a very beautiful and excellent infrastructure with great facilities like a library, well-furnished labs, conference rooms, seminar halls, board room, grounds, hostel, gym, ATM, post office, etc. Selection can be made via JEE, CG, PET or direct admission also. For direct admission, there are some minimum charges which have to be paid. Hostel facilities are very good with the best and clean mess food and rooms. The management is ...

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges in Chhattisgarh.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are excellent in our college. Our college has very good Wi-Fi. Classrooms and labs are up to date. The library has lots of books for students, and students can access books in the library easily. The hostel and food provided by the mess are also good. Our college also provides medical facilities and conducts events and games for students.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure of the college is good, and the college is surrounded by greenery.
reviews.review_text: The hostel has a good infrastructure with a free Wi-Fi facility and ground to play. In the hostel, the mess facilities are good, and the rooms are well furnished. There is no problem with water and electricity. The warden of the hostel is helpful. The hostel is situated on the main road.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Sengunthar Engineering College offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Sengunthar Engineering College courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Sengunthar Engineering College courses stands around INR 35,000 to 2,00,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Sengunthar College of Engineering considers Class 12 score for UG and graduation marks for PG programmes. Aspirants must fulfil the eligibility requirements to apply for admission. Below is course-wise Sengunthar College of Engineering eligibility criteria:CourseCommon EligibilityBTech/ BEClass 12 with Physics, Chemistry and MathematicsMEGraduation*
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for Sengunthar College of Engineering?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates who have passed graduation are eligible to apply for Sengunthar College of Engineering ME programmes. Besides, aspirants must also qualify CEETA PG or GATE or CET for admission to ME programme. Aspirants need to participate in CEETA PG Counselling for a seat in Sengunthar College of Engineering.
faqs.question: Who is eligible for ME at Sengunthar College of Engineering?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates have to fill out the CEETA PG application form for Sengunthar College of Engineering ME programme. The application fee is INR 1,800 + GST (INR 900 + GST for SC/ ST/ SCA of Tamil Nadu). Aspirants can pay the application fee via any of the online payment modes. Further, candidates also need to pay a counselling fee to apply for CEETA PG counselling for ME admission.
faqs.question: What is the CEETA PG application fee for Sengunthar College of Engineering?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Sengunthar College of Engineering considers GATE score for admission to ME programme. Graduate Aptitude Test in Engineering or GATE is a national-level entrance examination conducted once in a year in online. Aspirants have to participate in CEETA PG Counselling with a valid score in GATE. Besides, aspirants can also apply for admission in ME with CEETA PG scores.

reviews_list.review_title: Our college is an excellent place to build your career.

review_content.Placements: In our college, almost 70% of students got placed in our batch as well as our department. The highest salary offered was Rs.16,000 per month and the lowest salary offered was Rs.12,000 per month. There were no internships or industrial visits. The top role offered was a quality inspector.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college had good infrastructure and laboratory facilities. The campus is vast with excellent canteen facilities. Our hostel was so good in terms of buildings as well as the surrounding water facilities which were good. The food was delicious, and there were unlimited meals available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I am absolutely satisfied because of the faculty and good placements in 2022.

review_content.Placements: A total of 52 companies visited our college, and the placement percentage was 90%. The highest salary package offered is 6 LPA. Our placement cell provides entrepreneurial skills and opportunities by conducting regular inductive programs.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our campus has separate hostels for boys and girls. We have a sports complex, a badminton court, a basketball court, a cricket ground, a football ground, and a volleyball court. We have an electronics lab, a mechanical lab, a survey lab, and a Linux lab. The college has a central library with 40,000 books, 120 Indian periodicals, and 56 international periodicals. The library has a collection of more than 1,400 CDS. A number of books for the preparation of competitive exams like GATE, TOEFL, GRE, GMAT, defense service, and civil service are available in both reference and issue sections.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of Sengunthar Engineering College.

content.Placements: The maximum student percent is above 75% because of our teachers teaching methods. In our course, the average package is offered to a maximum of 80% of students. TCS, Wipro, etc. are the top recruiting companies for our course. Eligibility for students to get an internship is that there are no arrears in their previous papers.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, there are experiment labs, software resources, computer rooms, projector rooms, and smart boards. Classrooms are equipped with audiovisual aids. Seminar rooms are there for group discussion. There is a well-stocked library. Also, we have good mess, a canteen, medical facilities, sports and play grounds, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Good college, and the infrastructure was good.

content.Placements: The percent of students placed in our college is approximately 20% per year. In our course, the highest package is INR 5 LPA, and the lowest package is INR 2 LPA. The required companies for our course are Infosys, TCS, and Wipro. The role offered in our course involves most of the computer software roles.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities of the college are good, but the hostel is bad. The class rooms and library labs are good; in our hostel, no quality food and snacks are provided in the mess, but the canteen is good. Medical facilities are available, and sports and games are also available.

content.Placements: A total of 52 companies visited our college, and the placement percentage was 90%. The highest salary package offered is 6 LPA. Our placement cell provides entrepreneurial skills and opportunities by conducting regular inductive programs.
content.Infrastructure: Our campus has separate hostels for boys and girls. We have a sports complex, a badminton court, a basketball court, a cricket ground, a football ground, and a volleyball court. We have an electronics lab, a mechanical lab, a survey lab, and a Linux lab. The college has a central library with 40,000 books, 120 Indian periodicals, and 56 international periodicals. The library has a collection of more than 1,400 CDS. A number of books for the preparation of competitive exams like GATE, TOEFL, GRE, GMAT, defense service, and civil service are available in both reference and issue sections.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Our college has moderate infrastructure.

content.Placements: About 30% of the students from our course were placed. The average salary package offered for students is Rs. 15,000 per month. The top recruiting company for our course is Techno Limited. The top roles offered in recruitment drives are fresher trainees. The average salary package in our course for students is 2 LPA. About 50% of the students got internships from our course.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities available for our department include moderate lab facilities. The quality of the hostel is a little bit low, and the food served is the worst. The infrastructure of our college is a bit average.

admission_overview.college_name: Sengunthar Engineering College Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

paragraphs: Sengunthar Engineering College admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG and PG levels in streams includingEngineering and Business and Management Studies.Sengunthar Engineering Collegeadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asGATE, CEETA, and TANCET. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 35,000 - 2,00,000for UG and PG level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses ranges between 3 years - 4 years.

faqs.question: Does Sengunthar College of Engineering offers lateral entry to BTech course?
faqs.answer: Yes, Sengunthar College of Engineering offers lateral to BE/ BTech programme. The selection for BE (Lateral Entry) is based on marks obtained in the Diploma examination. Candidates have to complete a minimum of Diploma for admission to BE (Lateral Entry) programmes.

faqs.question: How can I get seat in BTech at Sengunthar College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: Sengunthar College of Engineering offers seats in BE/BTech course based on merit of the candidates in the last qualifying exam. Aspirants have to complete Class 12 with PCM for BE/ BTech admission. Selected candidates are further offered seat through TNEA Counselling. Aspirants have to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the college.

faqs.question: What are the various B.E specialisations offered at Sengunthar College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: Sengunthar College of Engineering offers four-year BE/ BTech programme divided into eight semesters. Candidates after completing Class 12 can apply for BE/ BTech. Below are the BE/ BTech specialisations offered at SCE:BE Medical ElectronicsBE Robotics & AutomationBTech Information Technology

courses_data.name: Sengunthar Engineering College M.E./M.Tech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Sengunthar Engineering College M.E./M.Techis offered to candidates at the PG level. Candidates are required to participate in the entrance-based admission process to be considered for the final admission offer. Candidates are shortlisted for the M.E./M.Tech programme based on their performance in the entrance exam. Candidates who qualify in the admission process are eligible to secure their seat in the 2 years programme.

faqs.question: Is CEETA-PG required for M.Tech at Sengunthar College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: Yes, CEETA-PG is required for admission to ME at Sengunthar College of Engineering. CEETA is the Common Entrance Examination for Engineering and Architecture which is mandatory for admission to ME. Applicants seeking admission to ME are required to apply and appear for CEETA- PG to be eligible for admission.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for ME at Sengunthar College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have passed graduation are eligible to apply for Sengunthar College of Engineering ME programmes. Besides, aspirants must also qualify CEETA PG or GATE or CET for admission to ME programme. Aspirants need to participate in CEETA PG Counselling for a seat in Sengunthar College of Engineering.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in M.Tech at Sengunthar College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: No, Sengunthar College of Engineering does not offer direct admission to ME course. Candidates have to pass CEETA PG, CET or GATE for admission to ME programme. Besides, aspirants must also complete their graduation to apply for admission. The seats are offered in ME course through CEETA PG Counselling.

faqs.question: How can students join Sengunthar Engineering College?
faqs.answer: Sengunthar College of Engineering application 2025 is carried out online. Applicants are required to check the course-specific eligibility criteria before applying for admission. Applicants seeking admission to BTech are required to fill out the TNEA Counselling application form by visiting their official website and M.Tech applicants are required to fill out the CEETA PG application form by visiting the official website. The steps to fill out theSengunthar College of Engineering application for

courses_data.name: Sengunthar Engineering College MBA/PGDM Admission 2025
courses_data.description: TheMBA/PGDMatSengunthar Engineering Collegeis a 2 years programme offered to the students in the field of Business & Management Studies. Admission to this course is offered based on a valid score in TANCET. To complete the Sengunthar Engineering College admission process for the 2025 batch, selected candidates must pay the applicable course fee ofINR 35,000.

faqs.question: Is GATE accepted at Sengunthar College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: Yes, Sengunthar College of Engineering considers GATE score for admission to ME programme.Graduate Aptitude Test in Engineering or GATEis a national-level entrance examination conducted once in a year in online. Aspirants have to participate in CEETA PG Counselling with a valid score in GATE. Besides, aspirants can also apply for admission in ME with CEETA PG scores.

faqs.question: Which entrance exams are accepted at Sengunthar College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: Sengunthar College of Engineering considers entrance exam score for admission to ME programme. The college offers admission based on GATE, CET or CEETA PG scores. Aspirants once selected have to participate in CEETA PG Counselling for seat allotment. For BE, no entrance exam is required. The selection for BE is based on merit in the last qualifying exam.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in Sengunthar College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: Sengunthar College of Engineering admissions are merit or entrance-based. The college considers Class 12 score for BE followed by the TNEA Counselling. The selection for ME is based on GATE, CET or CEETA PG scores. Selected candidates need to participate in CEETA PG counselling for seat in Sengunthar Engineering College ME programme.

faqs.question: Can I join Sengunthar College of Engineering without TNEA Counselling?
faqs.answer: The answer to this question depends on the course selected by the candidates. Any aspirants who wish to get admission in Sengunthar College of Engineering BE programme need to participate in the TNEA Counselling. During the counselling, candidates are alloted seat in the institutes based on the Class 12 score of the candidates. Hence, candidates cannot take admission in BE without TNEA Counselling.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sengunthar Engineering College.
reviews.review_text:
In our college, there are experiment labs, software resources, computer rooms, projector rooms, and smart boards.
Classrooms are equipped with audiovisual aids.
Seminar rooms are there for group discussion.
There is a well-stocked library. 
Also, we have good mess, a canteen, medical facilities, sports and play grounds, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Good college, and the infrastructure was good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities of the college are good, but the hostel is bad. The class rooms and library labs are good; in our hostel, no quality food and snacks are provided in the mess, but the canteen is good. Medical facilities are available, and sports and games are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is an excellent place to build your career.
reviews.review_text: Our college had good infrastructure and laboratory facilities. The campus is vast with excellent canteen facilities. Our hostel was so good in terms of buildings as well as the surrounding water facilities which were good. The food was delicious, and there were unlimited meals available.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied because of the faculty and good placements in 2022.
reviews.review_text: Our campus has separate hostels for boys and girls. We have a sports complex, a badminton court, a basketball court, a cricket ground, a football ground, and a volleyball court. We have an electronics lab, a mechanical lab, a survey lab, and a Linux lab. The college has a central library with 40,000 books, 120 Indian periodicals, and 56 international periodicals. The library has a collection of more than 1,400 CDS. A number of books for the preparation of competitive exams like GATE, TOEFL, GRE,...

reviews.review_heading: Our college has moderate infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available for our department include moderate lab facilities. The quality of the hostel is a little bit low, and the food served is the worst. The infrastructure of our college is a bit average.

reviews.review_heading: I was very impressed and satisfied with college because they provide many placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our course is very good, and they provide Wi-Fi facility with 100Mbps speed. Labs facilities are best and maintenance was very good. The hostel has a very good infrastructure. Water and food facilities were good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied about my college features.
reviews.review_text: Our college has Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library and water facility with neat and pure air even in classrooms and hostels. Medical facilities may depend on features of the module. There is equal importance to sports and games. Mess and canteen provide tasty food.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with studies but not with the placements.
reviews.review_text: It's not big college. It's an average college. We have all labs and classes and other requirements, but they are only limited. So we can't consider it a well-constructed college, but we do have everything for your studies related things.

reviews.review_heading: In college, there are days when celebrations are also going. It organises many other programs and ev
reviews.review_text: There are no hostels at the college. The college infrastructure is neither very good nor very bad. There are no games at the college. There is no Wi-Fi. Departments are good and very helpful to us. The food quality is good. Classrooms are good, and labs are also good. A hostel is in the center of the city with friendly staff members, clean facilities, and comfortable beds. The hostel has a fully fitted kitchen, strong Wi-Fi, and clean toilets and showers. Our college campus is looking very good.

reviews.review_heading: It is absolutely better.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available in the college, like classrooms, library, labs, and workshops, are good. The quality of food is average. Sports in college are good. They will train for sports for which we would like them to be good.

reviews.review_heading: Should include key terms that reflect the content of the review.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi in the college and hostel. The college has a good academic environment with supportive faculty. Classrooms and labs are well-maintained and equipped. Hostel facilities are clean and comfortable for students. The library has a wide range of books and digital resources. Fees are reasonable compared to the facilities provided. It is a good college for both academics and personal development.

review_summary.college_name: St.Mary's Group of Institutions, Guntur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am somewhat satisfied with college.My college has not reached my expectations Ihad before joining.

content.Placements: There are good placements in our college. But, very few students receive college placements, and they are offered low-LPA jobs. The highest salary package offered is 7 LPA and the lowest salary offered is 3 LPA. There are no top recruiting companies for my course in our college. Out of 100, only 30% of students have joined internships in web development and data science.
content.Infrastructure: We have good computer labs available in our college, but the faculty do not use them properly for the students. Many chemistry and physics labs are also available, but the faculty has failed to utilize them effectively. Hostel food is average. Our college is very good in terms of sports, but there are no proper medical facilities available in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Best place for entertainment but not for studies.

content.Placements: For our batch, there is no proper placement. They are saying that they are getting placements, but these are totally useless. Most of them are BPOs only. Few companies are saying that the placement is for IT roles only, but there will be no response after the placement interviews regarding selection.
content.Infrastructure: There will be lab periods, but rarely, and practice periods are less. The hostel is like *. There are 30 members per room and nearly 150 members per floor. There are no attached washrooms, and only 5 washrooms are available for 150 students. They don't even provide racks to students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Good college, best placements, and best faculty.

content.Placements: I recently graduated with a Bachelor of Technology in 2023 in the stream of computer science engineering. It was an amazing experience in college. Yes, top roles are offered in my course. Yes, this course offered high-demand programming.
content.Infrastructure: No wi-fi is available in the hostel. Wi-fi is available in labs only. All facilities are available in our campus hostel. Yes, food is available for parents in the canteen. Food facilities are good sources of healthy food. Medical facilities are also good. Sports and games are also in there.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college is not as good for to get a great job and knowledge.

content.Placements: May be 3 percent of students are placed in our course and the students placed had got offer letter but they didn't placed. On this academic year we have got only nearly three to four companies. And the companies are some of them are call center jobs and some for only women.
content.Infrastructure: It is good and have a small unused. Library, playground canteen. From. Tjos academic year our college has became only womendcollege and we are the last batch of the coed batch of our college. There is no hostel in our college. But from. This academic year there is only women hostel. And the hostel facilities for girls not bad.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The college has qualified faculty to teach and provides placements every year.

content.Placements: The pass percentage of the students who passed out is an average of 65-70%. The highest package offered in our course is 2.6 LPA, and the lowest package offered in our course is 1.6 LPA. The top recruiting companies for our course are O-Mex and Excelero.
content.Infrastructure: All the classrooms have sufficient benches and also have 3 projector rooms and a Wi-Fi facility for 26 computer systems. The library has a huge capacity. The classrooms are very clean and also have a blackboard to write on. Sometimes they also provide PPT on the projector. Our labs have good equipment and chemicals to experiment with. We should also maintain aprons, neat shoes, and shirts. Our college maintains more displays and also has a good atmosphere.

admission_process.title: St.Mary's Group of Institutions, Guntur Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: St.Mary's Group of Institutions, Guntur admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, St.Mary's Group of Institutions, Guntur considers scores in GATE, AP EAMCET, and AP PGECET for admission to specific courses.St.Mary's Group of Institutions, Gunturoffers courses at the UG, PG and After 10th levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 4 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 1,40,000 - 1,60,000. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 54,000 - 1,30,800. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

reviews.review_heading: Review of St.Mary's Group of Institutions, Guntur.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a separate block for engineering and a huge library. The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Labs are good with good equipment. We have wi-fi facilit...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with joining this institution.
reviews.review_text: Our institute has good infrastructure and facilities like Wi-Fi, good labs with perfect equipment, a huge library, and good playgrounds for cricket, volleyball, basketball etc. Projectors are available in classrooms so that the students can understand the lectures very easily. We have 2 canteens which provide good quality food. I didn't visit the hostel rooms. I faced an issue with the infrastructure, but it was rectified within 2 days.

reviews.review_heading: The college is satisfactory because of good teaching faculty and placements.
reviews.review_text: There is a sufficient number of classrooms and labs in our college. Sports facility is also available. The college maintains quality labs and classrooms. Quality food is available in the canteen. Hostel rooms are the best. I didn't face any problems regarding my studies in the college.

reviews.review_heading: It was better to choose my college because good infrastructure with good placement's.
reviews.review_text: There are good infrastructure is provided in our college. My college have canteen facility with good food and hostel is good and the Wi-Fi facility is also available and library with 1 Lacs books facility, there is also online library provided and there is a play ground with the facilities of all games.

reviews.review_heading: Finally, our college is good for those who cannot offer much money, but they get quality education.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi facility in our campus, and there are also no lab materials. The library was good, but the books should be increased. If there is a sports period, the faculty will take that hour. The quality of labs and classrooms is quite good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: This is an average review, but I am very satisfied with the coding club and the music club.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 70% of students at our college are placed, with top recruiting companies being TCS, Infosys, and others. Students find and complete their internships on their own. The top roles offered are just for "time pass," as there is no practical knowledge of the latest technology. There is very poor information about the latest industry trends, and placements are not very strong here.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the facilities a person needs are available, but the fees are very high compared to what is provided, and there is no freedom. The fees are very high compared to the facilities. For everything you do in class, they will charge you a ₹250 fine.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Unbreakable experience - A journey worth living.

review_content.Placements: Our college provides excellent placement opportunities with top MNCs visiting every year. Many students from my batch get placed in reputed companies like TCS, Infosys, and Wipro with decent salary packages. The placement cell is very supportive and conducts mock interviews and workshops to prepare us.
review_content.Infrastructure: Campus is clean and well-maintained. Classrooms are equipped with projectors and smart boards. Library has a wide collection of books and journals. Hostel facilities are decent, with proper security, Wi-Fi, and hygienic food provided in the mess.

review_summary.college_name: Gyanmanjari Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college has good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Our college provides very good placement opportunities for students. Around 80 to 85 percent of students from our batch are successfully placed in reputed companies. The highest package reaches 12 LPA, the lowest package is around 3 LPA, and the average package is approximately 6 LPA. Top recruiters include TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Capgemini, L&T, and Tech Mahindra. Many students also receive internship opportunities in companies like Cognizant and IBM. It helps them gain practical industry experience. The roles offered include software developer, data analyst, web developer, and IT support positions.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good placement with placement support, modern infrastructure, and active campus life.

content.Placements: The Computer Engineering branch recorded a 98% placement rate, the highest among courses. IT & Core Recruiters are TCS, Capgemini, Infosis, Wipro, Way to Web, and many more than 250+ companies have placement drives in the present year. Average CTC is generally reported between 3 to 5LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Air conditioned classrooms with advanced touch boards and projectors, we also have a huge hall which has the capacity to keep a huge number of students together. A huge library with more than 41,000 books and journals related to engineering and other courses.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: This is an average review, but I am very satisfied with the coding club and the music club.

content.Placements: Approximately 70% of students at our college are placed, with top recruiting companies being TCS, Infosys, and others. Students find and complete their internships on their own. The top roles offered are just for "time pass," as there is no practical knowledge of the latest technology. There is very poor information about the latest industry trends, and placements are not very strong here.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities a person needs are available, but the fees are very high compared to what is provided, and there is no freedom. The fees are very high compared to the facilities. For everything you do in class, they will charge you a ₹250 fine.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Unbreakable experience - A journey worth living.

content.Placements: Our college provides excellent placement opportunities with top MNCs visiting every year. Many students from my batch get placed in reputed companies like TCS, Infosys, and Wipro with decent salary packages. The placement cell is very supportive and conducts mock interviews and workshops to prepare us.
content.Infrastructure: Campus is clean and well-maintained. Classrooms are equipped with projectors and smart boards. Library has a wide collection of books and journals. Hostel facilities are decent, with proper security, Wi-Fi, and hygienic food provided in the mess.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good placements and has decent faculty members.

content.Placements: About 80% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered is 15 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are BharatPe, TCS, and Infosys. All students got internships from our course. Top roles offered are manager, coder, etc. It depends on companies' demand.
content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi on campus. Our college does not provide us with a Wi-Fi password. All classrooms are air-conditioned. There is no hostel in our college. Our college has a canteen. It will be upgraded. There is no mess facility in our college. Our college conducts sports for two hours a week.

For admission to the courses provided byGyanmanjari Institute of Technology, candidates must complete the application form, which is available online on the official website of the institute. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department. The institute provides courses in various streams such asEngineering, Medicine and Health Sciences and IT and Software, etc. There are several courses for candidates to choose from at Gyanmanjari Institute of Technology. reviews.review_heading: Absolutely best college for you and your life.

reviews.review_heading: The best college in Bhavnagar.

review_content.General: The placement is too good. Sharing my personal experience, I got selected in placement in my last semester. I got a good salary package and a nice company. This college is giving good placement opportunities to students. In my batch, many of my friends got a job from the college placement. 4-5 companies came for placement. I got a job in Apollo company. The starting salary package is 30,000 per month. There are different roles offered in some companies like supervisor, quality control senior assistant, in the production line as well as in the control department. review_summary.college_name: D A V College of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Good placements and faculty support

content.Placements: The placement is too good. Sharing my personal experience, I got selected in placement in my last semester. I got a good salary package and a nice company. This college is giving good placement opportunities to students. In my batch, many of my friends got a job from the college placement. 4-5 companies came for placement. I got a job in Apollo company. The starting salary package is 30,000 per month. There are different roles offered in some companies like supervisor, quality control senior assistant, in the production line as well as in the control department. Many of my classmates got the internship also with 15,000 per month as the stipend and other allowances. Overall, the placement is very good in this college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Decreasing the quality of everything.

content.Placements: None of the students from my batch or my seniors' batch got placed. Almost 1-2% of students get placed every year. The highest salary offered was 7 LPA and the average salary was 2-4 LPA. Since last 2 years, no companies have visited our college but earlier, the college was good enough to welcome Wipro, Airtel, Sonha Steering and other local companies. As far as the internship is concerned, usually, around 50% students get an internship from the college. Only a few of them get a stipend, and almost everyone worked for free during the internship.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2009

content.Other: This college in mechanical branch is superb, in all over India. Comes in top 10 ranking in mechanical engineering, and environment of this college is also superb and campus structure is also good and faculty is helping in nature as they are always ready to help students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: DAV College of engineering and technology: Is different but unique in its own way.

content.Placements: Placements in the college are very good. Many Big companies like infosis, viproans and TCS come to the college and students get good packages. The highest package last year was 32 Lacs by amazon. Regular placement training classes are also arranged for students to help them.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is also good. There are proper equipments available to the students. There is also a inbuilt bank and ATM for students convenience. There are two hostels and parks seperate each for boys and girls. The location of the college is also in convenience of students.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and faculty support
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is also good. It has a central Wi-Fi zone, good and clean classrooms, a big library with lots of books, little medical facilities also but we have first-aid kit facilities only. We have one ground for sports too. The quality of labs and classrooms is good. But they have to improve it, especially for labs. Food of the canteen is average, neither good not bad. It still needs improvement in quality, quantity and the menu of food in the canteen. I don't know much a...

reviews.review_heading: Decreasing the quality of everything.
reviews.review_text:
The college's infrastructure is quite good. The buildings are good but now no one is taking care of that building. We have 3 computer labs and one dedicated building for the classrooms. Our library has around 8000 books, but only a few of them are useful. This place is good for sports and games. We have facilities for table tennis, badminton, volleyball, football, and a basketball court, tennis court and a huge cricket ground.
The quality of food available is good now but at my time, it was bad....
